notes: Current main is v1.9.2. Do NOT re-propose: cosmetic Object.assign/{} (PR #2 declined). Issues #10 and #12/#13: CI caching and Dependabot config PRs blocked by GitHub Actions .github/ permission — do not attempt to modify .github/workflows/ files. PR #14 (BEGINS_WITH/CONTAINS) open. PR #19: docs README rewrite. PR #20: test hyphenated attr. PR #21: getItemsPage cursor pagination. PR #22: fix deleteItem ReturnValues. PR #25: fix all-undefined updates no-op. PR #26: eslint-jest plugin. PR #27: test batchGetItems projection + ASC sort. PR #29: perf updateItem ReturnValues ALL_NEW. New test PR (TBD): putItem undefined stripping, projection+filter combo, stronger GSI projection assertions. New perf PR (TBD): putItem avoid extra GetItem. PR #25, #29, and new perf PR all touch updateItem or putItem — rebase needed if merged out of order. 37 existing jest/no-conditional-expect warnings surfaced by PR #26.
